choices: Throwing a punch before the bell

questions.q: What is the minimum weight limit for a light heavyweight boxer according to modern boxing standards?

Which heavyweight champion was known for his devastating overhand right and fought throughout the 1970s?

choices: Dropping the hands to absorb body shots
Holding an opponent to prevent punching

Win a title at age 21 or younger
Defeat two champions in the same calendar year
Win the title without losing a single round

questions.q: Which weight class sits directly between Bantamweight and Featherweight on the professional boxing scale?
